response.justification: While this candidate meets the minimum 19 years of engineering experience and current staff-level seniority, they lack the demonstrated AI expertise and strategic thought leadership critical for a director-level AI strategy role. Current AI exposure is recent and infrastructure-focused (MCP frameworks), not the product, platform, or business strategy expertise the role requires. No advanced degree in AI and no history of shipping AI-powered products or advising at strategic levels.
strengths: Exceeds 15+ year requirement with strong staff-level seniority across multiple senior roles
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure work, showing recent engagement with agentic AI systems
Proven ability to teach and communicate technical concepts across diverse audiences
concerns: AI expertise is very recent and limited to infrastructure tooling, not demonstrated AI product or platform leadership
No Master's or PhD in AI or related field; lacks formal foundation in ML/AI research or theory
No evidence of director-level strategic influence—background is broad engineering execution, not strategic positioning in cloud or AI markets

key_factors.factor: Lack of demonstrated AI product/platform expertise
